scripts.build: node scripts/prepare-prod.js && cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: node scripts/prepare-prod.js && cd server && npx prisma db push --skip-generate && node dist/index.js
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
